Short CV

Research Assistant Muhammet Enes AKDAĞ graduated from İstanbul Şehir University, Department of Cinema and Television (English) in 2020. he completed his master's degree at Galatasaray University, Department of Media and Communication Studies in 2022. He continues his doctorate education, which he started in 2022 at Kadir Has University, Department of Communication Sciences (English). Muhammet Enes AKDAĞ is a Research Assistant in the Department of New Media and Communication (English).
